## Problem

Describe the problem or gap you are facing. What can't you do today?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you have already considered.

## Additional context

Links, references, or other context that would help evaluate the request.
